---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
Describe the gap or pain point - e.g. a question about your usage that
the dashboard/CLI currently can't answer.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see (a new view, CLI flag, dashboard panel, etc).

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you're using today, or other approaches you considered.
